content: GANDHI INSTITUTE OF ENGINEERING TECHNOLOGY UNIVERSITY, ODISHA, GUNUPUR (GIET LINIVERSITY) OFFICE OF THE CONTROLLER OF EXAMINATIONS Ref. No. 133 /GIETU/Exam/2026 Date: - 17/01/2026 NOTICE This is for information of the students concerned that, the subject registration for the Supplementary Examinations of the following course will be held as per the schedule given Dates of Registration 19.01.2026 Rs.400/- per below. and subject 20.01.2026 » Students are advised to submit the filled in Back Paper Registration form along with the Xerox Copy of the money receipt to their respective Head of the Department. » Application Received after the due date will not be considered. » The Examination will commence from 28" Jan’ 2026. | % Co ller of Examinations @, GIET University Memo No: 135 (1) /GIETU/Exam Date: 17.01.2026 Copy to: 1) The Vice-Chancellor/Registrar/ Dean Academics for information. 2) Principal — School of Nursing/Coordinator for information and necessary action. 3) Accounts Section / Library / ERP / E-Class. 4) GIET University Website / Notice Board. Cantroller of Examinations @, GIET University
